title: ZLKSKER 14-083-22-S Lawn Mower Air Filter Replace for Kohler 1408322S 14-083-22-S1, Fits Specific XT650 XT675 Lawn Mower Engine, 1pcs
features: L x W x H = 4.30 x 3.62 x 0.63in, 30g/1.1oz, Pack of 1.
Easy to install. Perfect fit for Kohler engine, as good as original.

Fit Kohler specific engines: XT650-3012, XT675-2044, XT675-2075, XT675-3105, XT675-3066, PH-XT675-3043, PH-XT675-2044, XT650, XT675, XT650-2031, XT650-2017. Compatible with Toro 22 inche recycler lawn mower 20378 20371 20377.
The filter is made of metal protective frame, PU adhesive and high-efficiency filter paper, well-made.

The flat pleated-paper filter: filter area is large, air intake resistance is reduced, the dust holding capacity is high, and the service life is increased. With metal protective frame, beautiful appearance, strong and durable. Anti-static ,Fire prevention, Acid resistant, High temperature resistance, Alkali resistance. Well-made. The filter is made of metal protective frame, PU adhesive and high-efficiency filter paper. Air filter is an important factor affecting engine performance and the first line of defense to protect engine.
